Tesla (TSLA) Stock Down 16% in 2026 Amid Robotaxi Setbacks and Revenue Shortfall - Blockonomi
This Will Be Tesla's Stock Price In 2027 - 24/7 Wall St.

summary: TSLA down ~16% YTD at ~$370-378. NHTSA closed investigation on Model Y steering bolts (no recall needed). First Semi truck off high-volume Gigafactory Nevada production line. Q1 earnings beat EPS estimates ($0.41 vs $0.33 expected). Robotaxi delays and $25B capex plan creating investor uncertainty. Services revenue +42% YoY to $3.75B; 1.28M active FSD subscriptions (+51%).
